value.stringValue: Flow Error - Pre Screener - Royal Mail Campaign

choices.name: Manton_Wood_Industrial_Estate_Worksop_S80_2RS
choices.choiceText: Manton Wood Industrial Estate, Worksop, S80 2RS

value.stringValue: Manton Wood Industrial Estate, Worksop, S80 2RS

choices.name: Mill_Hill_Distribution_Park_Peterlee_SR8_2H
choices.choiceText: Mill Hill Distribution Park, Peterlee, SR8 2HR

value.stringValue: Mill Hill Distribution Park, Peterlee, SR8 2HR

fields.name: Contact_Details_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Submitted!

Your details have been submitted to our team who are looking forward to learning even more about you.


An email link to our online registration is on it’s way to your inbox so you have the link whenever you need it.


Want to start your registration now? Why wait? Click sign up below to create your account…


{!Sign_Up_Image}

fields.name: Contact_Text
fields.fieldText:
Contact Details

Thanks for telling us more about yourself! You’re on your way to becoming part of the team and we can’t wait to meet you.

 

The next step is to get fully registered, please enter you details below to receive an email link to our online registration portal where you can continue your online application and on competition book yourself in for a brief interview.

fields.name: First_Name
fields.fieldText: First Name

fields.name: Last_Name
fields.fieldText: Last Name

fields.name: text
fields.fieldText:
Sorry

Thank you for your interest, however this role doesn’t seem like the right fit for your next career move.


﻿Click the button below to see a selection of our other roles that may be of interest to you.


﻿

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
Oops...looks like something is not working quite right.


Details have been sent to system admin. In the meanwhile, try submitting this page again but make sure you enter valid email and phone number.

fields.name: Error_Message_1
fields.fieldText: The email you entered is invalid. Please use a valid email.

value.stringValue: What role are you interested in?
Which of the locations are you interested in working at?

fields.name: Text_Question12
fields.fieldText: Questions

fields.name: Q2
fields.fieldText: Can you get to your selected location by your own transport or public transport?

fields.name: Q3
fields.fieldText: There is a variety of shift start times, please select your preference from the below:

rightValue.stringValue: Manton Wood Industrial Estate, Worksop, S80 2RS
Mill Hill Distribution Park, Peterlee, SR8 2HR

fields.name: Q4
fields.fieldText: All Royal Mail employees must undergo a criminal record check. Are you willing to undergo a DBS criminal record check?

fields.name: Q5
fields.fieldText: Do you have a record of your address for the past 5 years?

fields.name: Q6
fields.fieldText: Are you happy to work for £11.40 per hour on day shifts or £13.70 per hour on night shifts?

rightValue.stringValue: Manton Wood Industrial Estate, Worksop, S80 2RS
Mill Hill Distribution Park, Peterlee, SR8 2HR

fields.name: Q7
fields.fieldText: Are you willing to work in a warehouse environment?

fields.name: Q8
fields.fieldText: Are you flexible and willing to take on a variety of tasks?

fields.name: Q9
fields.fieldText: Do you hold a UK Driving Licence with more than 1 years driving experience and no more than 6 points on your licence?

fields.name: Q10
fields.fieldText: Are you prepared to work outdoors in all weathers?

fields.name: Welcome_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
We’re currently recruiting Postal Sorters and Drivers/Delivery Persons for Royal Mail, one of the UK’s most recognised and loved postal services.


The Royal Mail offers you an excellent opportunity to work in an upbeat and energised environment. So, if you are an organised individual, who thrives in a fast-paced environment, then we would love to hear from you.

textTemplates.name: Details
textTemplates.text:
What role are you interested in?

{!Q1_Question.topValue}


Which of the locations are you interested in working at?

{!Q1_Question.middleValue}


Postal Sorter


Can you get to your selected location by your own transport or public transport?

{!Q2}


There is a variety of shifts start times, please select your preference from the below:

{!Q3}


All Royal Mail employees must undergo a criminal record check. Are you willing to undergo a DBS criminal record check?

{!Q4}


Do you have a record of your address for the past 5 years?

{!Q5}


Are you happy to work for £11.40 per hour on day shifts or £13.70 per hour on night shifts?

{!Q6}


Are you willing to work in a warehouse environment?

{!Q7}


Are you flexible and willing to take on variety of tasks?

{!Q8}


Driver / Delivery Person


Do you hold a UK Driving Licence with more than 1 years driving experience and no more than 6 points on your licence?

{!Q9}


Are you prepared to work outdoors in all weathers?

{!Q10}


All Royal Mail employees must undergo a criminal record check. Are you willing to undergo a DBS criminal record check?

{!Q4}

textTemplates.name: Error_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Flow Error Message: 
{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

Run Time: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Candidate Email:   {!Email.value}
Candidate Phone:   {!Mobile.value}
